recommendations.title: Mirrors
recommendations.overview: An ex-cop and his family are the target of an evil force that is using mirrors as a gateway into their home.

recommendations.title: Oxygen
recommendations.overview: A woman wakes in a cryogenic chamber with no recollection of how she got there, and must find a way out before running out of air.

recommendations.title: Horns
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of his girlfriend's mysterious death, a young man awakens to strange horns sprouting from his temples.

recommendations.title: The 9th Life of Louis Drax
recommendations.overview: A psychologist who begins working with a young boy who has suffered a near-fatal fall finds himself drawn into a mystery that tests the boundaries of fantasy and reality.

recommendations.title: Never Let Go
recommendations.overview: As an evil takes over the world beyond their front doorstep, the only protection for a mother and her twin sons is their house and their family’s protective bond.

recommendations.title: Crawl
recommendations.overview: When a huge hurricane hits her hometown in Florida, Haley ignores evacuation orders to look for her father. After finding him badly wounded, both are trapped by the flood. With virtually no time to escape the storm, they discover that rising water le

recommendations.title: The Hills Have Eyes
recommendations.overview: Based on Wes Craven's 1977 suspenseful cult classic, The Hills Have Eyes is the story of a family road trip that goes terrifyingly awry when the travelers become stranded in a government atomic zone. Miles from nowhere, the Carter family soon realize

recommendations.title: The Cabin in the Woods
recommendations.overview: Five friends set out for a weekend at a remote cabin in the woods, expecting nothing more than fun and relaxation. As night falls, they discover that something far more unsettling is at work and that nothing about their getaway is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Night of the Hunted
recommendations.overview: When an unsuspecting woman stops at a remote gas station in the dead of night, she's made the plaything of a sociopath sniper with a secret vendetta. To survive, she must not only dodge his bullets and fight for her life, but also figure out who want

recommendations.title: Fear Island
recommendations.overview: Five students on spring break meet at a secluded island cabin for a weekend getaway. Stranded on the island they become the prey of a mysterious killer who seems bent on revenge for something the friends have done.
